base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of simon_whip_level_3_color_1 — a character from 1986 castlevania. Morning Star whip (level 3, max) — longest reach. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Morning Star whip (level 3, max) — longest reach; has 4 color-flash variants (colors 1-4) that rapidly cycle during strike-animation to simulate metal-glint flash. This is color 1 of 4. 4-stance × 3-frame grid
